bold-editorial.content:
# Bold Editorial — Style Guide

tags: light-mode, bold, editorial, high-contrast, bold-typography, sharp-corners, landing-page

## Description
High-impact editorial design for content platforms and magazine-style layouts. Strong typographic hierarchy with large display sizes, high contrast black-on-white base, and a vibrant red accent. Minimal decoration lets content speak.

## Color System
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| bg-page | #FFFFFF | Page background |
| bg-card | #F5F5F5 | Card/container background |
| bg-surface | #E5E5E5 | Elevated surface (hover, active states) |
| bg-accent | #DC2626 | Accent background (buttons, selected state) |
| text-primary | #0A0A0A | Primary text |
| text-secondary | #404040 | Secondary text |
| text-muted | #737373 | Muted text (placeholder, disabled) |
| text-on-accent | #FFFFFF | Text on accent background |
| border | #D4D4D4 | Border, divider |
| accent | #DC2626 | Primary accent |
| accent-hover | #B91C1C | Accent hover |
| success | #15803D | Success |
| error | #DC2626 | Error |
| warning | #CA8A04 | Warning |

## Typography
| Level | Size | Weight | Font | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|------|-------|
| display | 40 | Bold | Sora | Hero numbers/titles |
| h1 | 28 | Bold | Sora | Page title |
| h2 | 22 | Bold | Sora | Section title |
| h3 | 18 | Medium | Sora | Card title |
| body | 15 | Regular | Inter | Body text |
| caption | 13 | Regular | Inter | Helper text |
| overline | 11 | Bold | Inter | Category label |

## Spacing
| Context | Gap | Padding |
|---------|-----|---------|
| Page sections | 40 | — |
| Between cards | 24 | — |
| Card internal | 16 | 24 |
| Form fields | 20 | — |
| Button group | 16 | — |
| Button internal | — | 12 24 |
| Input internal | — | 10 16 |
| Nav items | 8 | 10 16 |

## Shape
| Element | Corner | Shadow |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Card | 2 | none |
| Button | 2 | none |
| Input | 2 | none |
| Badge | 2 | none |
| Avatar | 999 | none |

## Icons
- Style: lucide
- Default size: 22
- Nav size: 24
- Small size: 16
- Active color: #DC2626
- Inactive color: #737373

corporate-blue-light.content:
# Corporate Blue Light — Style Guide

tags: light-mode, corporate, clean, blue-accent, webapp, shadows, rounded

## Description
Professional enterprise SaaS aesthetic with a trustworthy blue palette. Clean white backgrounds with subtle gray surfaces, blue accent for primary actions. Designed for data-heavy B2B applications where clarity and hierarchy matter most.

## Color System
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| bg-page | #F8FAFC | Page background |
| bg-card | #FFFFFF | Card/container background |
| bg-surface | #F1F5F9 | Elevated surface (hover, active states) |
| bg-accent | #2563EB | Accent background (buttons, selected state) |
| text-primary | #0F172A | Primary text |
| text-secondary | #475569 | Secondary text |
| text-muted | #94A3B8 | Muted text (placeholder, disabled) |
| text-on-accent | #FFFFFF | Text on accent background |
| border | #E2E8F0 | Border, divider |
| accent | #2563EB | Primary accent |
| accent-hover | #1D4ED8 | Accent hover |
| success | #16A34A | Success |
| error | #DC2626 | Error |
| warning | #D97706 | Warning |

## Typography
| Level | Size | Weight | Font | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|------|-------|
| display | 32 | Bold | Inter | Hero numbers/titles |
| h1 | 24 | Bold | Inter | Page title |
| h2 | 20 | Bold | Inter | Section title |
| h3 | 16 | Medium | Inter | Card title |
| body | 14 | Regular | Inter | Body text |
| caption | 12 | Regular | Inter | Helper text |
| overline | 11 | Medium | Inter | Category label |

## Spacing
| Context | Gap | Padding |
|---------|-----|---------|
| Page sections | 32 | — |
| Between cards | 20 | — |
| Card internal | 16 | 24 |
| Form fields | 16 | — |
| Button group | 12 | — |
| Button internal | — | 10 20 |
| Input internal | — | 10 14 |
| Nav items | 4 | 8 12 |

## Shape
| Element | Corner | Shadow |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Card | 12 | 0,1,3,0,#0000000D;0,4,12,0,#0000000A |
| Button | 8 | 0,1,2,0,#0000000D |
| Input | 8 | none |
| Badge | 6 | none |
| Avatar | 999 | none |

## Icons
- Style: lucide
- Default size: 20
- Nav size: 20
- Small size: 16
- Active color: #2563EB
- Inactive color: #94A3B8

fintech-dark.content:
# Fintech Dark — Style Guide

tags: dark-mode, fintech, dashboard, crisp, blue-accent, monochrome, webapp

## Description
Sleek dark interface for financial technology and data-dense dashboards. Deep blue-gray palette with electric blue accents conveys precision and trust. Space Grotesk provides a modern, technical feel while remaining highly legible for numerical data.

## Color System
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| bg-page | #0B1121 | Page background |
| bg-card | #111827 | Card/container background |
| bg-surface | #1F2937 | Elevated surface (hover, active states) |
| bg-accent | #3B82F6 | Accent background (buttons, selected state) |
| text-primary | #F9FAFB | Primary text |
| text-secondary | #9CA3AF | Secondary text |
| text-muted | #4B5563 | Muted text (placeholder, disabled) |
| text-on-accent | #FFFFFF | Text on accent background |
| border | #1F2937 | Border, divider |
| accent | #3B82F6 | Primary accent |
| accent-hover | #2563EB | Accent hover |
| success | #10B981 | Success |
| error | #EF4444 | Error |
| warning | #F59E0B | Warning |

## Typography
| Level | Size | Weight | Font | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|------|-------|
| display | 32 | Bold | Space Grotesk | Hero numbers/titles |
| h1 | 24 | Bold | Space Grotesk | Page title |
| h2 | 20 | Bold | Space Grotesk | Section title |
| h3 | 16 | Medium | Space Grotesk | Card title |
| body | 14 | Regular | Inter | Body text |
| caption | 12 | Regular | Inter | Helper text |
| overline | 11 | Medium | Inter | Category label |

## Spacing
| Context | Gap | Padding |
|---------|-----|---------|
| Page sections | 24 | — |
| Between cards | 16 | — |
| Card internal | 12 | 20 |
| Form fields | 14 | — |
| Button group | 10 | — |
| Button internal | — | 10 16 |
| Input internal | — | 10 14 |
| Nav items | 4 | 8 14 |

## Shape
| Element | Corner | Shadow |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Card | 10 | 0,0,0,1,#FFFFFF08 |
| Button | 8 | none |
| Input | 8 | none |
| Badge | 6 | none |
| Avatar | 999 | none |

## Icons
- Style: lucide
- Default size: 20
- Nav size: 20
- Small size: 14
- Active color: #3B82F6
- Inactive color: #4B5563

terminal-dark.content:
# Terminal Dark — Style Guide

tags: dark-mode, developer, monospace, sharp-corners, green-accent, minimal, dashboard

## Description
Developer-focused dark interface inspired by terminal aesthetics. Monospace typography, zero border radius, and a green accent evoke a code editor feel. High contrast text on near-black backgrounds for extended use comfort.

## Color System
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| bg-page | #0A0A0A | Page background |
| bg-card | #141414 | Card/container background |
| bg-surface | #1E1E1E | Elevated surface (hover, active states) |
| bg-accent | #22C55E | Accent background (buttons, selected state) |
| text-primary | #E4E4E7 | Primary text |
| text-secondary | #A1A1AA | Secondary text |
| text-muted | #52525B | Muted text (placeholder, disabled) |
| text-on-accent | #052E16 | Text on accent background |
| border | #27272A | Border, divider |
| accent | #22C55E | Primary accent |
| accent-hover | #16A34A | Accent hover |
| success | #22C55E | Success |
| error | #EF4444 | Error |
| warning | #EAB308 | Warning |

## Typography
| Level | Size | Weight | Font | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|------|-------|
| display | 28 | Bold | JetBrains Mono | Hero numbers/titles |
| h1 | 22 | Bold | JetBrains Mono | Page title |
| h2 | 18 | Bold | JetBrains Mono | Section title |
| h3 | 15 | Medium | JetBrains Mono | Card title |
| body | 14 | Regular | JetBrains Mono | Body text |
| caption | 12 | Regular | JetBrains Mono | Helper text |
| overline | 11 | Bold | JetBrains Mono | Category label |

## Spacing
| Context | Gap | Padding |
|---------|-----|---------|
| Page sections | 24 | — |
| Between cards | 16 | — |
| Card internal | 12 | 16 |
| Form fields | 14 | — |
| Button group | 10 | — |
| Button internal | — | 8 16 |
| Input internal | — | 8 12 |
| Nav items | 2 | 8 12 |

## Shape
| Element | Corner | Shadow |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Card | 0 | none |
| Button | 0 | none |
| Input | 0 | none |
| Badge | 0 | none |
| Avatar | 0 | none |

## Icons
- Style: lucide
- Default size: 18
- Nav size: 20
- Small size: 14
- Active color: #22C55E
- Inactive color: #52525B

warm-organic.content:
# Warm Organic — Style Guide

tags: light-mode, warm, organic, earth-tones, rounded, soft, wellness

## Description
Warm, inviting aesthetic for health, lifestyle, and wellness applications. Earth tones with terracotta accents, generous rounded corners, and soft shadows create a calming, approachable feel. DM Sans provides friendly readability.

## Color System
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| bg-page | #FBF8F4 | Page background |
| bg-card | #FFFFFF | Card/container background |
| bg-surface | #F5EFE6 | Elevated surface (hover, active states) |
| bg-accent | #C2410C | Accent background (buttons, selected state) |
| text-primary | #292524 | Primary text |
| text-secondary | #78716C | Secondary text |
| text-muted | #A8A29E | Muted text (placeholder, disabled) |
| text-on-accent | #FFFFFF | Text on accent background |
| border | #E7E5E4 | Border, divider |
| accent | #C2410C | Primary accent |
| accent-hover | #9A3412 | Accent hover |
| success | #15803D | Success |
| error | #B91C1C | Error |
| warning | #B45309 | Warning |

## Typography
| Level | Size | Weight | Font | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|------|-------|
| display | 36 | Bold | DM Sans | Hero numbers/titles |
| h1 | 26 | Bold | DM Sans | Page title |
| h2 | 20 | Bold | DM Sans | Section title |
| h3 | 16 | Medium | DM Sans | Card title |
| body | 15 | Regular | DM Sans | Body text |
| caption | 13 | Regular | DM Sans | Helper text |
| overline | 11 | Medium | DM Sans | Category label |

| Badge | 999 | none |
